name: VRL + Full GPTQ + 5-gram Cache + Hidden-State kNN-LM
blurb: Hidden-state kNN-LM (Khandelwal 2019, first in competition) + online 5-gram cache with adaptive confidence-gated mixing. VRL + Full GPTQ (Hessian-aware, calibrated within 600s training budget) + LeakyReLU² + XSA-all(11). No safety gate (pre-committed confidence gate per #677). 3-seed mean 1.0970 (std 0.0006).
author: gowtham0992
